chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 7143 of 2018 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ For orders as to maintainability of petition 02.05.2025 Mr. Hassan Khan Durrani, advocate for the petitioner Agha Zafar Ahmed, advocate for respondent Mr. Fawad Chand advocate holds brief for Dr. Shahnawaz Memon, advocate for respondent Mr. Muhammad Siddique advocate files Vakalatnama of Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for respondent No.2, which is taken on record. This petition is pending since 2018 for orders as to maintainability of petition. Even though the prayer clause demonstrates that the grievance of the petitioner was with respect to some consignment and / or delay detention in respect thereto. It is pointed out that the consignment has been auctioned and if the petitioner has any grievance in such regard the same may be agitated in appropriate proceedings. Be that as it may, the grievance is subsequent to this petition and not covered by the prayer clause and insofar as petition is concerned, it appears to have become infructuous and disposed of accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
